Class GuiElementManager

java.lang.Object
com.pot_pot_golf.Game.GameUtils.FieldManager.GuiElementManager
public class GuiElementManager extends Object
The GUI element manager class. This class is responsible for managing the GUI elements of the game. Stores the GUI elements of the game.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • GuiElementManager

      public GuiElementManager()
      The constructor of the GUI element manager. It initializes the menu buttons and in-game menu buttons lists.

      Parameters:
      gameState - The game state manager.
